text.title: RAG Feature Acceptance Contract — Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to author a signed acceptance contract from raw query logs to registered recontract triggers.

step.name: cluster-intents
step.input: ≥500 production or beta queries, labelled or unlabelled
step.action: Embed queries; run HDBSCAN at min_cluster_size=20; surface top clusters to PM + SME for naming. Reject clusters with <50 samples — re-sample first.
step.output: `intents.yaml` with ≥2 named intents and per-intent sample counts
step.decision-gate: If only 1 cluster survives → escalate; methodology assumes ≥2 intents and the contract has no value with one.

step.name: draft-rubric
step.input: Per-intent sample of 30 queries, SME calendar block of 4h
step.action: Run SME interview using `templates/sme-interview-guide.md`. Co-author pass/borderline/fail examples per intent with verbatim quotes from real queries. Document acceptable_failure mode explicitly.
step.decision-gate: If SME refuses to commit pass/fail examples → STOP — there is no ground truth, ship is a coin flip.

step.name: set-offline-thresholds
step.input: Rubric + chosen eval framework + current-system baseline run
step.action: Score the current system (or human baseline) against the rubric. Set thresholds as baseline × {1.05, 1.10, 1.20} per PM tolerance. Every threshold cites its baseline inline.
step.output: `intents.<name>.offline` map with ≥2 metric:value pairs + baseline citations
step.decision-gate: If a threshold cannot cite a baseline → reject; PM must commit to an acceptable error rate instead.

step.name: pair-online-telemetry
step.input: Production telemetry plan (or commitment to instrument it)
step.action: For every offline metric, name the online signal that confirms it (thumbs-down, escalation, follow-up-rephrase, zero-result). Verify the signal is captured today; if not, instrument before signing.
step.decision-gate: If telemetry isn't live → block contract sign-off until it is; offline-only contract is forbidden (r3).

step.name: collect-signatures
step.input: Drafted YAML + PM + SME + ML engineer availability
step.action: Each signer reviews the contract independently. Sign with named email + date + contract version. Reject proxy signatures, generic "team lead" signatures, or AI signatures.
step.decision-gate: If any signature is missing → contract is INVALID; do not run the regression gate against it.

step.name: register-recontract-triggers
step.action: Wire `recontract_triggers` to the monitor: chi-square on intent distribution, embedding-model version, online-vs-offline divergence. Each trigger files a ticket; none auto-revises the contract.
step.output: Monitor configuration committed; contract registered in CI as ship gate
step.decision-gate: If recontract trigger fires post-launch → freeze next ship, re-open contract, re-sign.
